author: Rachel
body:
Thanks for the shoutout Matt :) I appreciate the support.

All of that is so exciting. Congratulations!

Oh, and speaking of shoutouts, Alex gave you one in his blog this morning. Have you read it yet? [http://blogs.myspace.com/index.cfm?fuseaction=blog.view&friendID=1709966&blogID=462769623](http://blogs.myspace.com/index.cfm?fuseaction=blog.view&friendID=1709966&blogID=462769623)

Take care

author: vibram fivefingers
body: I really like this type of Merchandise too, can you help me look at which one has higher price point?
